sourcesContent:
// theme.js

export const darkAITheme = {
  name: "dark",
  body: "#0a0e1a",
  text: "#e0e6f0",
  expTxtColor: "#c8d0e0",
  highlight: "#121830",
  dark: "#060810",
  secondaryText: "#8892a8",
  imageHighlight: "#00d4ff",
  compImgHighlight: "#1a1f35",
  jacketColor: "#7c3aed",
  headerColor: "#00d4ff55",
  splashBg: "#060810",
  accentGradient: "linear-gradient(135deg, #00d4ff 0%, #7c3aed 100%)",
  cardBg: "rgba(18, 24, 48, 0.6)",
  cardBorder: "rgba(0, 212, 255, 0.15)",
  glowColor: "#00d4ff",
};

export const lightTheme = {
  name: "light",
  body: "#f8fafc",
  text: "#0f172a",
  expTxtColor: "#1e293b",
  highlight: "#e2e8f0",
  dark: "#0f172a",
  secondaryText: "#64748b",
  imageHighlight: "#0284c7",
  compImgHighlight: "#e2e8f0",
  jacketColor: "#7c3aed",
  headerColor: "#0284c777",
  splashBg: "#f8fafc",
  accentGradient: "linear-gradient(135deg, #0284c7 0%, #7c3aed 100%)",
  cardBg: "rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.8)",
  cardBorder: "rgba(2, 132, 199, 0.15)",
  glowColor: "#0284c7",
};

export const chosenTheme = darkAITheme;
